jobspy.notes: Scraping major boards may violate TOS. Use proxies for LinkedIn. Default to assisted-apply; do not auto-prep packets — user clicks through.

remoteintech.notes: Company seed list (~880 companies). Auto-prep means we build a packet pointing at the careers URL — submission is still manual.

greenhouse.notes: Public API. Auto-prep builds a packet referencing the Greenhouse apply URL; user reviews + submits.

lever.notes: Public API. Auto-prep builds a packet; user reviews + submits.

ashby.notes: Public API. Auto-prep builds a packet; user reviews + submits.

remotive.notes: Public API. Auto-prep builds a packet; user reviews + submits.

wwr.notes: Public RSS feed. Auto-prep builds a packet; user reviews + submits.

google_jobs.notes: Requires SERPAPI_API_KEY or SEARCHAPI_API_KEY. Auto-prep builds a packet; user reviews + submits.

custom_rss.notes: Auto-prep builds a packet; user reviews + submits.
